Bash(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json

data = json.dumps\({'email': 'wojtek.maczynski@somasolution24.com', 'password': 'Admin123!'}\).encode\(\)
req = urllib.request.Request\('http://localhost:5174/api/v1/auth/login', data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='POST'\)
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req\) as r:
        print\(r.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\('HTTP', e.code, e.reason\)
    print\(e.read\(\).decode\(\)[:500]\)
")
